title: Google pulls the plug on Tenor API, kills GIF libraries in other apps

Anish Moonka on X: "Every GIF search in Discord, WhatsApp, and Bluesky ran through one service. Google owns it. On June 30, they're shutting it down.

Tenor's website and app are still running. What Google killed is the technology connecting Tenor's GIF library to every other app on the internet." / X
